bundle_metadata.selection_note: A0 core models come from the formal progressive summary baseline and point back to the exact matrix artifact used for that cell.

tool_calls.purpose: repo_export_inventory: identify all directories, hidden files, data folders, notebooks, outputs, checkpoints, and existing export artifacts
ignore_rule_mismatch: inspect existing .gitignore rules to understand current exclusion patterns

runner_response_json.user_facing_response: I need to inspect the repository structure and existing .gitignore rules before determining what is safe to include in export.zip for external sharing.
runner_response_json.brief_rationale: Before I can advise on export sanitization or ask targeted policy questions, I must first recover the grounded facts: what files exist (including hidden, data, notebooks, outputs, checkpoints, prior exports) and what the current .gitignore already excludes. These are recoverable via inspection and are prerequisites for identifying secrets, demo assets, and policy gaps.
